title: Removing Links to tasks
excerpt:
Simply trying to delete a task and the following message is displayed. 
Note:there are other boards connected to items in this board. 
Deleting this task will also remove any existing connections it has.

posts.author: Trencric (Rich)
posts.cookedHtml:
Simply trying to delete a task and the following message is displayed.

Note:there are other boards connected to items in this board.
Deleting this task will also remove any existing connections it has.

How do I see what the link is and remove it. Be great if there was a little more information about the details on the link.

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Rich! Totally get where you’re coming from on this!

I actually made a video on this a few months ago; I’ve attached the link here to help explain why this message pops up!

Let me know if you have issues trying to watch the video!
